note: Created WgSocketConnectsToWireguardGoPeerTests.cs with 7 tests: HandshakeCompletes_WhenWgSocketInitiates, WgSocketStats_ShowPeerAfterHandshake, DataTransfer_WgSocketToWireguardGo, DataTransfer_WireguardGoToWgSocket, BidirectionalTransfer_BothDirectionsSimultaneously, MultipleSequentialConnections_AllSucceed, LargePayloadTransfer_64KB. All tests skip gracefully when wireguard-go unavailable.
